rag_rules: Place output range guarantees in component type annexes when concrete bounds are available
Use visible feature names in output dependency guarantees
Declare helper variables with correct AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool)
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Use proper AGREE syntax for assumptions, guarantees, equations, and constants
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds or visible relations for range assumptions and guarantees
Declare helper variables with appropriate types matching their expressions
Avoid direct use of AADL properties in AGREE expressions
Use proper AGREE syntax for all contract elements
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks use `annex agree {** ... **};` syntax
Use `eq` for equations, `const` for constants, `assume` for assumptions, and `guarantee` for guarantees
Valid AGREE scalar types are int, real, and bool
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not use AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
Do not declare AGREE variables with invalid scalar types
